case_title: SMITH, BARRY VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,130.73 FILED BY SMITH, BARRY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, BARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS $1,661.42 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,682.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO MARTHA HUEY MUNI RAILWAY ADJUSTER S.F. CITY AND COUNTY RETURNED SIGNED.
